DEFENDANT SEAN WHELEN's Motion for Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Sean Whelen's summary judgment/adjudication motion is denied as moot. Whelen filed his motion in December 2019, directed to the original complaint in the case. A first amended complaint with different plaintiffs and allegations was filed with leave of court in March 2020. The "filing of an amended complaint moots a [summary adjudication] motion directed to a prior complaint." (State Compensation Ins. Fund v. Sup. Ct. (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1131.)
